channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Series of broken up road on mini roundabout outside Churchdown Parish Council Offices, 17th June
item.description:
Mini Roundabout by Churchdown Parish Council Offices and Churchdown Community Centre
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parton Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on corner of St Stephen’s Road and Andover Road, 17th June
item.description:
Bin bag and cardboard left on pavement near 2 St Stephen’s Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Saint Stephen's Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Longlevens elmleaze, 17th June
item.description:
Someone has dumped a fridge outside on public property, It has been there since December 2025, It’s a white and it’s blocking the pavement for people to access like people in wheel chairs and old people and people who have disability’s,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmleaze, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: Bishops Bath overgrown, 16th June
item.description:
I don’t know who is responsible for the upkeep of The Bishops Bath and surrounding area. It is very overgrown and unkempt and one of the benches nearby has been vandalised

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Dowty Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Mess Russell street no 20.(again), 16th June
item.description:
Not for first time massive mess outside of that property…this time cardboard and different rubbish on pavement Russell street outside no 20 Can you please send some to talk to people leaving in that property they need to understand they can’t leave rubbish outside on pavement as pavement is not part of there’s rented property. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Russell Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Pembridge Close, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester

item.title: Lots of old wood dumped in gulley outside entrance to Cheltenham Animal Shelter, 16th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gardners Lane, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 16th June
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole approx 600x600x40mm plus x 6 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 16th June
item.description:
Road closure lane closure 28 day carriage way pothole approx 1000x300x50mm (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised drain cover outside 6 Arle Gardens, 16th June
item.description:
Outside 6 Arle Gardens is a storm drain that sits higher than the surrounding road surface. Therefore, when it rains the water cannot go into the drain and water remains around it for a long time after the rain has stopped as it has nowhere to go.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Arle Gardens, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface
